title: koeleria lasiorhachis
intro: Koeleria lasiorhachis, also known as the tufted hair-grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria lasiorhachis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Koeleria lasiorhachis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional medicine, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in the development of new pharmaceuticals.
